description: kylie minogue Showtime Eau de Toilette for women is a tantalizing cocktail of wild strawberry, loganberry and blackcurrant which leads into an armload of roses, blue freesias, lilacs and tiare flowers spiked with sweet liquorice. All beautifully balanced on magnetic notes of rosewood, white musk and a praline-vanilla accord.Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesAvoid spraying near the eyes
